basic_01_inventory_cash.reason: Core entry correct (Dr Inventory $100), but added HST Receivable $5 debit and inflated Cash credit to $105. Differences are purely tax-related.

basic_02_inventory_on_account.reason: Core entry correct (Dr Inventory $300, Cr AP), but added HST Receivable $39 and inflated AP to $339. Differences are purely tax-related.

basic_03_issue_stock_with_apic.reason: Exact match. Common Stock = Share capital-Common, Additional Paid-In Capital = APIC. Amounts match.

basic_04_sell_inventory.reason: Core entry correct (COGS $300, Revenue $500, Inventory $300), but Cash inflated to $565 and HST Payable $65 added. Differences are purely tax-related.

basic_05_pay_accounts_payable.reason: Exact match. Accounts Payable = Trade payables. Amounts correct.

basic_06_refinance_loan.reason: Semantically equivalent. Loan Payable - Old/New = Notes payable (old extinguished, new created). Amounts match.

basic_07_loan_to_equity.reason: Semantically equivalent. Loan Payable = Notes payable, Common Shares = Share capital-Common. Amounts match.

basic_08_deliver_service_against_deposit.reason: Semantically equivalent. Customer Deposits = Contract liabilities, Service Revenue = Revenue. Amounts match.

basic_09_repurchase_stock.reason: Exact match. Treasury Shares = Treasury shares. Amounts match.

basic_10_declare_dividend.reason: Semantically equivalent. Dividends (declared) is a contra-equity account that reduces Retained earnings; both treatments are standard. Dividends Payable matches. Amounts match.

basic_11_convert_preferred_to_common.reason: Exact match. Preferred Shares = Share capital-Preferred, Common Shares = Share capital-Common. Amounts match.

basic_12_pay_salaries.reason: Exact match. Account names and amounts match.

basic_13_accrue_utility.reason: Semantically equivalent. Accounts Payable is an acceptable alternative to Accrued liabilities for utility accruals. Amounts match.

basic_14_casualty_loss.reason: Semantically equivalent. Loss on Inventory = Casualty loss (both are loss/expense accounts for inventory destruction). Amounts match.

basic_15_no_entry.reason: Correctly identified no journal entry needed. Empty lines array matches expected null entry.

int_03_machinery_purchase.reason: Exact match. Machinery = PP&E Machinery, Accounts Payable = Trade payables. Amounts match.

int_04_major_overhaul.reason: Exact match. Machinery = PP&E Machinery. Amounts match.

int_05_bond_issuance_discount.reason: Match within acceptable PV rounding tolerance. Cash differs by $19 ($2,657,510 vs $2,657,529), discount by corresponding $19. Bonds Payable exact at $3,000,000.

int_06_warranty_provision.reason: Exact match. Warranty Provision = Provision for warranties. Amounts match.

int_07_decommissioning_provision.reason: Semantically equivalent. PP&E = PP&E Marine structures, Accounts Payable = Trade payables, Asset Retirement Obligation = Decommissioning provision. Amounts match.

int_08_share_repurchase_cancel.reason: Exact match. Common Shares = Share capital. Amounts match.

int_10_prepayment.reason: Exact match. Prepaid Expenses = Prepayments. Amounts match.

int_12_site_improvements.reason: Account name differences: Land Improvements vs Land (different depreciation treatment), Building Improvements vs PP&E Site improvements. Also combined two Cash credits ($1,750K + $2,360K from different accounts) into single Cash $4,110K.

int_13_donation_note.reason: Exact match. Account names and amounts match.

int_15_bank_loan.reason: Semantically equivalent. Bank Loan Payable = Long-term borrowings. Amounts match.
